ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Continued To Dec-04-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
Michael Abrate, Esq., for Margaret Cole, Petitioner.

The court notes that it was expecting either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition to Approve Status of Administration. At the court's query, counsel offers an update regarding the Estate and reports that the sole asset of the Estate is a pending distribution from a related Trust.

At the conclusion of discussion, the subject matter is continued to Dec-04-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
